metadata.description: AI Agent Army — multi-agent development framework for Claude Code. 10 specialized agents + 6 skills covering the full software development lifecycle with Clean Architecture enforcement.

plugins.name: agent-army
plugins.description: AI-powered software development team — 10 specialized agents (tech-lead, architect, implementer, tester, reviewer, documenter, security-auditor, integrator, doc-manager, reporter) + 6 skills (assemble, sprint, quality-gate, context-sync, dev-standards, setup) for full SDLC coverage with Clean Architecture enforcement.
